name: Vital Step
description: Integrated palm and grip monitoring system with palm pressure mapping and grip strength tracking for comprehensive rehabilitation. App-driven AI provides personalized adaptive therapy based on real-time data. Wireless connectivity enables remote patient monitoring with cloud-based data storage.

name: Dental Bite Force
description: IoT-based rehabilitation device used to measure bite strength. The test measures the force exerted on a pressure sensor using the jaws.

name: Foot Pressure
description: Foot pressure testing system used to assess foot function by measuring pressure distribution across the foot. Helps healthcare professionals identify functional issues and monitor rehabilitation progress.

name: Hand Grip
description: IoT-based rehabilitation device used to measure hand strength using a grip dynamometer. Commonly used in physical therapy, sports training, and general fitness assessments.

name: Smart Drinking Device
description: IoT-based rehabilitation device designed for stroke patients. It measures the angle of deviation while drinking to track hand movement and recovery progress.

name: SafeBite: Bite Force Monitoring Device
description: Compact and cost-effective IoT device for measuring bite force during dental occlusion. Designed for single bite force evaluation with precise data for dental restoration, periodontal treatment, and orthodontic assessment.
